 {"id":"bd-jpwu","title":"Use manifest installed_check/verify for detection + readiness","description":"Goal:
- Use ACFS manifest installed_check/verify to drive detection and readiness rather than hardcoded command -v checks.

Scope:
- Support installed_check.run_as and command fields.
- Safely execute checks with timeouts and output caps.
- Fallback to command -v only if manifest does not provide checks.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit/integration: bd-1rdc (parsing + detection), bd-1kkl (fallback/refresh paths).

Definition of Done:
- Detection reflects manifest checks and yields consistent availability results.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:47:55.868092017Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:32:02.444069096Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","detection","integration","registry"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-jpwu","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:47:56.116970571Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-jpwu","depends_on_id":"bd-1sz8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:23.676567772Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-jpwu","depends_on_id":"bd-2k5b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:06:42.197900991Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-jpwu","depends_on_id":"bd-ka28","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:21.677929866Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Scope:

- Implement a manifest loader that parses YAML, validates schema, and supports env overrides.

- Local file path (default) with optional override via env.

- Caching with TTL to avoid repeated disk reads.

- Unit: bd-6huy (cache/TTL/error mapping), bd-1kkl (fallback/refresh/provenance coverage).

 {"id":"bd-mipc","title":"E2E contract tests for tool clients using stub binaries","description":"Goal:\n- Build a stub CLI harness to validate client wrappers (NTM/br/caam/apr/ms/pt/jfp).\n\nScope:\n- Deterministic fixtures + JSON output validation.\n- Detailed logs for every tool invocation (args, exit, stdout/stderr).\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- E2E tests run in CI and validate client behavior.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:20.038767626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:11:13.225246999Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["clients","e2e","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-16dr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:11:13.224052319Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-1d1j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:11:20.659924880Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-1spt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:10:40.202852610Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-27jf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:10:57.077210206Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-2h6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:10:24.582032453Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-2p50","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:09:20.250143574Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-2qcv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:10:48.433785062Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-35cf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:10:32.875954514Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-3bex","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:11:05.268285088Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-mipc","depends_on_id":"bd-pfkx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:11:14.972732849Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
